name: Darren Boé
title: Managing Partner
bio: Dr. Boe (pronounced bo-ay) graduated from Louisiana State University/School of Medicine in New Orleans, served his residency at Duke University Medical Center in Durham, NC and his fellowship at the University of Colorado Health Sciences Center in Denver. He is board certified in Pulmonology, Critical Care, Neurocritical Care and Internal Medicine. Dr. Boe is married with two children and enjoys skiing, hiking, golf, and spending time with his family.
education: Louisiana State University Health Sciences Center, New Orleans, LA
residency: Duke University Medical Center, Durham, NC
fellowship: University of Colorado Health Sciences Center, Denver, CO
